system.description: When things get real and you need to act under pressure, tell the Director what you intend to do and roll +Nerve.

failure.value: Something goes wrong. If you are not In Jeopardy!, mark In Jeopardy! If you are In Jeopardy!, unmark it and take a Condition.

partial.value: The Director gives you a worse outcome, a hard choice, or a price to pay. If you were In Jeopardy!, you are still In Jeopardy!

success.value: You do what you set out to do. Unmark In Jeopardy! if it was marked.

critical.value: You do what you set out to, and either something extra happens or you do it to absolute perfection. You gain an Edge, and unmark In Jeopardy! if it was marked.
